market_overview.headline: Broad market remains in Full Bear structure across all major indices with geopolitical tensions driving risk-off sentiment.
market_overview.detail: SPY, QQQ, and BTC all trapped in Full Bear formations while 39% of stocks sit in Full Bear and only 31% maintain Full Bull signals. War concerns and rate fears have created a toxic combination for risk assets.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversals - Early Bottom Signals

momentum_themes.headline: Tech Hardware Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology names dominate momentum leadership with optical and semiconductor equipment showing exceptional acceleration. Storage and connectivity plays driving the theme.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy vs Tech Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bull score as oil rallies on war premium.
Infrastructure plays benefiting from defense spending themes.
Gold and mining names finding safe-haven demand.

weakest.note: Software severely punished in risk-off environment.
Auto and discretionary spending under pressure.
Banks hit by rate uncertainty and recession fears.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear flight to safety into energy and materials while growth tech gets demolished. War premium driving commodity complex while rate sensitive sectors suffer.

items.text: All major indices in Full Bear structure - no broad market support
Technology services 91% bearish - growth leadership collapsed
War escalation could trigger further commodity spikes and risk-off
Rate uncertainty persists with Fed policy unclear amid geopolitical chaos

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Wall Street rallied on hopes for potential Iran war de-escalation despite Pentagon refusing to reaffirm NATO commitments and Europe pushing back on US military operations. Geopolitical tensions continue to dominate market sentiment with energy spiking and tech under pressure.

items.text: Pope Leo and diplomatic sources suggesting 'off-ramp' possibilities for Iran conflict
US military tensions with Europe as France surprised by Trump criticism
IRGC threats against American firms escalating corporate security concerns
Energy crisis measures being considered by EU in response to war developments
NVIDIA-Marvell partnership announcement providing some tech sector support
